actions.result: New chat, Plugins, Automations, Project, Codex mobile, Settings, composer controls visible
remote control page visible with Linux copy bug

cdp_launch.evidence: CDP /json/version returned Codex/26.616.41845 Electron/42.1.0 user agent; browser tab attached to http://127.0.0.1:5175/?mcpAppSandboxDevtools=1

plugins_page.evidence: Sidebar Plugins button opened Plugins/Skills surface with search, Added/Manage, OpenAI/workspace/personal sections and plugin catalog entries such as Data Analytics, Gmail, Canva.

automations_page.evidence: Automations page opened and displayed Create your first automation, Daily brief, Weekly review, Project monitor. No automation was created to avoid recurring side effects.

mobile_remote_page.evidence: Codex mobile page opened, but copy says "Connect your phone to this Mac" on Linux. Remote connection was not enabled.

new_chat.evidence: New chat button returned composer with model selector, custom mode selector, dictation button, file/add button, Work in a project control.

project_work_in_project.evidence: Clicking Project and Work in a project via DOM/CDP produced no visible project picker or file dialog text change during this run; earlier team evidence remains PARTIAL only.

settings_button.evidence: Settings button was present but DOM click did not navigate/open visible settings panel in CDP-controlled renderer during this run.

voice_dictation_button.evidence: Dictate button present in composer; microphone permission/use not exercised.

image_file_input.evidence: Add files and more button present; synthetic image/file upload not exercised because Electron host file picker/attachment workflow not reliable through CDP in this run.

web_search_prompt.evidence: App returned WEB_SEARCH_STATUS: available and cited Codex app - OpenAI Developers after using web search. Screenshot final-ui-state.png captures result and Sources area.

add_files_menu.evidence: Add files and more menu opened with Files and folders, Goal, Plan mode, Agents list, Files and chats search. Native file picker/upload not exercised.

final_screenshot.evidence: remaining/final-ui-state.png captures Codex UI with web search result, add-files menu, sidebar surfaces.
